driver_subject: iio:temperature:mlx90614: Switch from CONFIG_PM* guards to pm_ptr() etc
stage1_reason: Multiple commits explicitly switch to new kernel APIs: pm_ptr/pm_sleep_ptr for PM guards, sysfs_emit for sysfs output, DEFINE_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS macro, MODULE_IMPORT_NS for symbol namespaces, and mod_devicetable.h replacing of headers.
stage2_reason: Driver commits explicitly switch to pm_ptr/pm_sleep_ptr APIs, which were introduced/redefined in kernel commit c06ef740d401 (PM: core: Redefine pm_ptr() macro) and 1a3c7bb08826 (PM: core: Add new *_PM_OPS macros, deprecate old ones). These kernel commits directly enable the driver migration pattern.
